summary: Iteration 73 - School Settings CRUD operations testing. Fixed critical bug: POST /school/constraints was inserting into admin_constraints instead of school_constraints. All backend tests pass (14/14). Frontend UI verified working.

fixed_in_this_iteration.issue: Was inserting into admin_constraints collection instead of school_constraints
fixed_in_this_iteration.fix: Changed db.admin_constraints.insert_one to db.school_constraints.insert_one in server.py line 3203

tests: test_update_subject - PASSED (no longer returns 'المادة غير موجودة')
test_update_constraint - PASSED (no longer returns 'القيد غير موجود')
School Settings page loads with 9 tabs - PASSED
Subjects tab shows subjects with edit/delete on hover - PASSED
Constraints tab shows 10 constraints with toggle buttons - PASSED
Time tab shows reset button and inline edit capability - PASSED
Users Management page shows Import/Export button in action row - PASSED
Create Class Wizard Grade dropdown shows Arabic names - PASSED
Schedule page shows schedule grid with class selector - PASSED

school_settings_subjects_crud.details: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE all working correctly

school_settings_constraints_crud.details: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE all working correctly after fix

time_tab_inline_edit.details: Shows reset button and inline edit capability

import_export_button_location.details: Button is in action buttons row, not in tabs

create_class_wizard_grade_dropdown.details: Shows grades with Arabic names (الصف الأول, الصف الثاني, etc.)

schedule_page_grid.details: Shows schedule grid with class selector after page load

critical_code_review_comments: The POST /school/constraints endpoint was inserting into wrong collection (admin_constraints vs school_constraints) - FIXED
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed POST /school/constraints to insert into school_constraints collection
seed_data_creation: Created test subjects and constraints with TEST_ prefix for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All School Settings CRUD operations are working. The fix applied was changing db.admin_constraints.insert_one to db.school_constraints.insert_one in the POST /school/constraints endpoint. Frontend UI is working correctly with edit/delete buttons appearing on hover for subjects and constraints.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: POST /school/constraints endpoint was inserting into admin_constraints collection while GET/PUT/DELETE were querying school_constraints collection
reproduction_steps: 2. Go to School Settings > Constraints tab
4. Try to delete the newly created constraint
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Changed line 3203 in server.py from 'await db.admin_constraints.insert_one(constraint_doc)' to 'await db.school_constraints.insert_one(constraint_doc)'
rca_of_the_issue.verification: After fix, create and delete constraint operations work correctly
